final_prompt: Create a professional instagram infographic. Constraints: minimalist, no copyright, teal theme. Content hook: Stop scrolling! Here's why Influencer Marketing ROI is changing the game.. Clean layout, sans-serif typography, central visual element.
logo_prompt:
Generate a logo for influight.

Layout: landscape-banner
Icon: paper-plane (using brand colors)
Bar arrangement: diagonal-cascade
Context mood: Stop scrolling! Here's why Inf...

Colors: R #E63946 · O #F4841A · Y #F5C518 · G #2A9D5C · T #1BA89A
Background: dark navy #0D1B2A
Wordmark: "influight" in white rounded sans-serif, clearly legible
All 5 colored pill bars must appear.

Negative prompt: serif, gradient, blurry, missing text, wrong colors
Output: 1200x600px transparent-bg PNG + dark-bg PNG
